{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent made several minor edits to the text, which improved readability and flow without altering the core claims or evidence.",
    "R1.4": "The agent provided a summary of changes but did not map against prior works or articulate specific deltas in detail.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged some citations for verification but did not audit every citation in the document.",
    "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainty about several factual claims and quantitative results, which is appropriate given the limited context provided.",
    "RX.3": "The agent recognized that several citations needed verification but did not provide bibliographic precision or map against a specific set of works.",
    "RX.4": "The agent flagged potential issues with the cited works and quantitative claims without introducing new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided detailed edits to the text, which are traceable, though some changes were not explicitly sourced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent made several minor edits to the text, which improved readability and flow without altering the core claims or evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The agent provided a summary of changes but did not map against prior works or articulate specific deltas in detail.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged some citations for verification but did not audit every citation in the document.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty about several factual claims and quantitative results, which is appropriate given the limited context provided.
rationale.RX.3: The agent recognized that several citations needed verification but did not provide bibliographic precision or map against a specific set of works.
rationale.RX.4: The agent flagged potential issues with the cited works and quantitative claims without introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided detailed edits to the text, which are traceable, though some changes were not explicitly sourced.
